## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO goals.](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zuplo aims to radically simplify API management for developers, targeting both enterprise and self-serve customers](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Current focus is on growing organic traffic through SEO, content creation, and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Zuplo has seen positive correlation between increased SEO traffic and demo bookings](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [GrowthX will help scale content creation, improve internal linking, and optimize for target keywords/ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)

## Topics

### Zuplo's Product and Market Position

  - [API management tool focused on simplifying API development](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Core product is an API gateway, expanding into broader API management features](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Main competitors are other API gateway and management providers](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Target industries include FinTech, Web3/crypto, and AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Current Content Strategy

  - [Mix of AI-generated content, guest posts, and in-house created articles](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Using tools like SEMrush for keyword research and ChatGPT for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [Manual process for internal linking and content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2566.0)
  - [Occasional video content creation with developer relations team](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)

### Traffic and Conversion Metrics

  - [Seeing linear correlation between SEO traffic and demo bookings](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Roughly 1 demo booking per 500 visitors per week](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Challenge in de-anonymizing users due to Gmail signups](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)

### Target Audience and ICPs

  - [Enterprise: CTOs, VPs of Engineering, Directors (500+ employee companies)](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Startups/Scale-ups: Founders, CTOs](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Self-serve: Software engineers, backend developers, API developers](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

### Content Goals and Priorities

  - [Increase organic traffic to compete with established competitors](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Focus on programmatic SEO for API directories to drive top-of-funnel traffic](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Improve backlink profile and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Create content that appeals to both enterprise decision-makers and individual developers](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### Brand Voice and Style

  - [Aiming for a "cool", maverick-like tone with strong opinions](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [Incorporate reverent humor and witty elements](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [Provide plenty of examples and explanations, like "your cool uncle explaining APIs"](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send summary of discussion and recording](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=3023.0)
  - [Adrian to provide additional brand guidelines and ICP positioning documents](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=3089.0)
  - [Schedule CMS walkthrough with Jen](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=3116.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare 3 calibration articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)
  - [Set up weekly check-in meetings](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=3145.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin competitor analysis and content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/snEnZoyuoyPqVgzh5hkXzjzUyBVT6hEs?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)
